findings.detail: Self-consistent caller registry with m_campaign=47 changes the campaign gate from false to true.
Both sides may omit a required semantic value and still form an accepted pair.
Non-finite outcomes can reach corrected significance and promotion_allowed=true.
Forty rows with one underlying_trade_id and dependency_cluster_id produce n_eff_final=40.0.
NaN validation net is not rejected and invokes walk-forward.
Exit parameter mutation is reported but does not block walk-forward or shadow candidacy.
Candidate row order changes accepted/incompatible reconciliation.
Ambiguous non-ASCII identifiers pass the current canonical ID check.
Overlapping partitions and invalid OHLC bounds are accepted.
Unknown side is interpreted as SHORT and zero entry can raise an unexpected exception.
Caller alpha, local multiplicity and tolerance overrides remain part of the gate API.
